admins.title: Tenant admins
admins.subtitle: Add or remove TenantAdmins for this tenant. Owner transfer requires a slug confirmation.
admins.ownerHint: Tenant owner — use Transfer ownership to move this role.

invite.kcPending: Operator must provision via kcadm.sh — DB rows landed.

transfer.title: Transfer ownership
transfer.body: This will move TenantOwner from {{from}} to {{to}}.
transfer.confirmHint: Type the tenant slug to confirm: {{slug}}

defaults.title: Platform defaults
defaults.subtitle: Default settings every tenant inherits from. Tenants can override at their own tier.
defaults.readonlyHint: You don't have platform.manage_defaults — values are read-only.

guard.forbiddenBody: You don't have permission to manage tenants. Sign in with a PlatformAdmin account.

list.title: Tenants
list.subtitle: Create, suspend, restore, or delete customer tenants.

create.title: New tenant
create.subtitle: Provision a tenant with an initial owner.

fields.slugHelp: URL-safe identifier, 3–32 chars, lowercase letters/digits/hyphens. Permanent.
fields.name: Display name
fields.ownerEmailHelp: Optional. If set, we provision the Keycloak group + send the welcome email.

errors.slugConflict: A tenant with this slug already exists.
errors.contactEmailInvalid: Contact email must be a valid address.
errors.ownerEmailInvalid: Owner email must be a valid address.
errors.createFailed: Could not create tenant. Please try again.

review.ownerNote: An UPDATE_PASSWORD email will be sent to {{email}}.
review.noOwnerNote: No owner specified — Keycloak provisioning is skipped. You can complete it later via the retry endpoint.

success.title: Tenant created
success.noOwner: Tenant ready. Provision the Keycloak owner manually or via the retry endpoint when ready.
success.pendingProvision: Tenant created, but Keycloak provisioning failed. Use 'Retry provisioning' on the detail page once the issue is resolved.

detail.title: Tenant detail
detail.subtitle: Profile, settings, and lifecycle actions.
detail.comingSoon: Lifecycle actions (suspend / reactivate / delete / purge) will appear here in PR-F.

banner.suspended: This tenant is suspended. Sign-ins are blocked.
banner.pending_delete: This tenant is marked for deletion. Purge eligible {{when}}.
banner.pending_provision: Provisioning pending — Keycloak invite hasn't completed yet.

suspend.title: Suspend tenant
suspend.body: Sign-ins for this tenant will be blocked within ~30 seconds. Existing data is preserved.

requestDelete.title: Mark tenant for deletion
requestDelete.body: Starts the {{days}}-day grace window. After that, the tenant can be hard-purged. Cancellation returns the tenant to suspended.

purge.title: Purge tenant — irreversible
purge.body: This will DROP SCHEMA the tenant, delete public rows, and remove the Keycloak group + users. There is no undo.
purge.forceWarning: Use only when authorised — bypasses the {{days}}-day cooling-off period.
